info.title: Xcelsior
info.description:
Distributed GPU orchestration platform for AI/ML workloads. Canadian-first data sovereignty (PIPEDA/Law 25), automated trust scoring, Stripe Connect marketplace billing, and real-time GPU telemetry.

**Authentication**: Bearer token via `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header.

**Regions**: Canada-first with province-level filtering (ON, QC, BC, AB, etc.).

**SDK**: Generate idiomatic Python/TypeScript SDKs with [Fern](https://buildwithfern.com).

**LLM Integration**: See `/llms.txt` for AI agent-optimized documentation.

This published OpenAPI document contains the public developer surface only. Account settings, internal worker, admin, maintenance, and callback endpoints are intentionally omitted.

post.description: Get a presigned upload URL for an artifact.
Get a presigned download URL for an artifact.

get.description: List all artifacts for a job.

Get expiry/cleanup dates for artifacts of a given job.

Returns each artifact with its created_at and estimated expiry date
based on the configured retention policy.

post.description:
Register a new user with email and password.

Creates an account and sends a verification email. The user must verify
their email before they can log in.

Authenticate with email and password.

Returns a Bearer token valid for 30 days.
If MFA is enabled, returns mfa_required=True with a challenge_id instead.

get.description:
Get the currently authenticated user's profile.

Returns ``user: null`` when no session is present (HTTP 200) so public
marketing pages can probe session state without console 401 noise.
Invalid or machine credentials still return 401/403.

post.description: Logout - invalidate session and clear cookie.

get.description: Get credit wallet balance and status.

post.description:
Create a Stripe PaymentIntent for depositing compute credits.

Returns client_secret for front-end Stripe Elements confirmation.
On payment_intent.succeeded webhook the wallet is credited automatically.

get.description: Check whether PayPal is configured.

post.description: Create a PayPal order for depositing compute credits.
Capture a PayPal order and credit the wallet.

Deposit credits into a customer wallet.

Production deposits must flow through Stripe webhooks, PayPal capture, or
crypto/Lightning - not this direct credit endpoint.

get.description: Get transaction history for a wallet.

Get real-time balance depletion projection.

Returns burn rate, seconds-to-zero, per-instance cost breakdown,
and alert thresholds (T-30min, T-5min, T-0).
Get usage summary for a customer.
Generate an AI Compute Access Fund-aligned invoice.

List past invoices for a customer (monthly summaries).

Generates monthly invoice stubs for the last N months showing
total spend, tax, job count, and top GPUs used.

Download an invoice as CSV or plain-text PDF-style document.

Formats: csv (spreadsheet-ready), txt (printable receipt).

post.description:
Estimate job cost with AI Compute Access Fund rebate preview.

From REPORT_FEATURE_2.md: --estimate-rebate / simulate=true

get.description: Get reference GPU pricing table in CAD.
Get current auto-top-up configuration.

post.description: Configure wallet auto-top-up via Stripe.

Submit a serverless inference request.

Schedules a short-lived GPU job that runs the specified model on the
provided inputs. Returns a job_id to poll for results.

get.description: Get inference results for a submitted request.
List available inference models and their resource requirements.

post.description:
Synchronous inference endpoint (OpenAI-compatible path).

Submits an inference request and polls for results up to 30 seconds.
If stream=true, returns SSE text/event-stream with token deltas.
Asynchronous inference - returns job_id immediately for polling.

get.description: Poll for inference results by job_id.
Feature-flag probe for dashboard rollout (session optional).
Alias for metrics - dashboard compatibility.

post.description:
Submit a job to the queue or directly assign to a host.

If host_id is provided (marketplace launch), the job is assigned directly
to that host and container start is attempted immediately. Otherwise,
the job is queued and process_queue runs to find a host.

get.description: List instances for the authenticated user (admins see all).
Get a specific instance by ID, enriched with connection info.

post.description: Cancel a running or queued instance. For interactive instances, stops the container.

get.description:
Get buffered log lines for a job (non-streaming).

Returns the last `limit` log lines. Tries in-memory buffer first,
falls back to persistent job_logs table in PG.
For real-time streaming, use `/jobs/{job_id}/logs/stream` (SSE).
List all priority tiers with their multipliers.
Search marketplace listings with filters and sorting.
Browse marketplace listings.
Marketplace aggregate stats (platform admin only).

post.description: Search available GPU offers with filters.

get.description: Get current spot prices for all GPU models.
Get spot price history for a GPU model.
Get marketplace aggregate statistics.

post.description: Create a reserved instance commitment.

delete.description:
Cancel a reserved instance commitment early.

Computes early termination fee: remaining_months * monthly_rate * 50%.

get.description: List volumes owned by the current user.

post.description: Create a new persistent volume. Billed in real-time from credits.

get.description: Get volume details.

delete.description: Delete a volume. Must not have active attachments.

post.description: Attach a volume to a running instance.
Detach a volume from its current instance.

bearerAuth.description: OAuth access token or API key. Obtain one via the OAuth flow (`POST /oauth/token`) or from your dashboard, then send it as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.

tags.name: Artifacts
tags.description: Presigned upload/download URLs for model weights, checkpoints, outputs.

tags.name: Billing
tags.description: Wallet management, invoicing, CAF exports, refunds. Credit-first CAD billing.

tags.name: Marketplace
tags.description: Rig listings, browsing, and marketplace billing.
